claim.leaf_count: terminal leaves satisfy the pinned affine moment/member-count bound
paid_routes: extension or already-paid ledgers where applicable
claim.state_count: reachable unpaid primitive saturated states <= n^{O(W^2)} for fixed W
claim.state_model: saturated root-closure states, not raw support branches

non_claims: does not bound raw sparse-support branch counts
does not remove the fixed-W hypothesis
does not produce the F17^32 M3/M4 root tables
